wpPortfolio.title: Automotive Regional Sales & Inventory Portal
wpPortfolio.content: emQube engineered a centralized web-based portal to manage MIS, inventory, and forecasting across 11 countries for a luxury automotive regional office.

softwarePortfolioLayout.aboutApplication:
The SMART system serves as a web-based data hub, generating sophisticated Tableau dashboards and reporting tools for comprehensive regional sales summaries. Local importers regularly update their monthly sales figures within the portal, allowing the regional headquarters to cross-reference these inputs against central inventory data.

This automated reconciliation provides a clear view of regional demand, directly supporting inventory planning and sales forecasting. The application serves as a single source of truth for all 11 importers, streamlining data collection and enabling leadership to drive data-backed operational decisions across the entire region.
softwarePortfolioLayout.clientName: A prominent German luxury automotive manufacturer operating throughout the Middle East.
softwarePortfolioLayout.testimonialContent: “The SMART portal has transformed how we manage regional inventory and sales forecasting. It gives us a single source of truth that allows us to make informed decisions for all 11 countries in our region.”
